issues: Code imports fetch_reddit_activity from reddit_activity adapter as required.
Code uses adapter output columns 'date', 'posts', 'comments', and also 'sentiment_score' and 'ticker' which are NOT in the adapter contract.
Adapter contract for reddit_activity specifies returns: ['date', 'posts', 'comments'] only; 'sentiment_score' and 'ticker' columns are used but not guaranteed by spec.
Signal logic partially matches spec intent: checks sentiment score increase >40% and mention volume >50, but uses aggregated sums in compute_signal instead of per-ticker checks as spec implies.
Exit logic in compute_signal checks per-position sentiment and days held correctly per spec.
Allocation logic correctly limits max concurrent positions to 5 and allocates 2% per position as per spec.
Allocation logic correctly filters tickers by sentiment increase >40% and mention volume >50 and excludes already held positions.
Overall, failure due to use of columns 'sentiment_score' and 'ticker' not defined in adapter contract, violating strict adapter output usage requirement.
